json.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
json.title: CPU Usage (5m avg)

json.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Available Bytes"
| extend AvailableMB = todouble(CounterValue) / 1000000.0
| summarize AvgAvailableMB = avg(AvailableMB) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend AvgAvailableMB = round(AvgAvailableMB, 2)
json.title: Available Memory (MB)

json.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| summarize AvgFree = avg(CounterValue) by InstanceName
json.title: Disk Free Space (%)

json.query:
Event
| where EventLevelName in ("Warning", "Error", "Critical")
| summarize count() by EventLevelName
json.title: Critical & Warning Events
